title: Even better — saves me the cross-referencing! I already have everything. Here's the full picture:

turns.agentText:
Even better — saves me the cross-referencing! I already have everything. Here's the full picture:

---

**Dub Grumble (bro.2856) — Attendance Summary**

**Overall frequency:** 152 runs out of 332 tracked — **45.8% attendance**, the highest of the three players we've looked at. However, in the recent May–June window they've actually dipped to **8 of 25 (32%)**, meaning they've been less present lately relative to their own baseline.

**Monday specifically: zero.** I checked every Monday raid in the recent window and bro.2856 was absent from all of them:

| Date | Day | Commander | bro.2856? |
|---|---|---|---|
| 2026-05-04 | Mon | Mesmer Kamoidra | ❌ Absent |
| 2026-05-11 | Mon | Not Haro | ❌ Absent |
| 2026-05-18 | Mon | Not Haro | ❌ Absent |
| 2026-06-01 | Mon | Prez Ashton | ❌ Absent |
| 2026-06-08 | Mon | Prez Ashton | ❌ Absent |

**Their night is Saturday.** Dub commands almost exclusively on Saturdays, and shows up every time they're leading (Jun 13, May 23, May 9 — all confirmed present). That's where the bulk of their 152 runs comes from historically.

**Profession depth** is impressive: Troubadour, Paragon, Specter, Berserker, Firebrand, Ritualist, Druid, Tempest, Harbinger, Scourge, Catalyst — 11 professions across 332 runs.

---

**Quick comparison across both players:**

| | Dub (bro.2856) | Kamoidra (Jordan.1860) |
|---|---|---|
| Overall attendance | 152/332 (46%) | 99/332 (30%) |
| Recent (May–Jun) | 8/25 (32%) | 11/25 (44%) |
| Monday tendency | None — 0/5 ❌ | None — 1/5 ✅ (own command night) |
| Primary night | **Saturday** | **Thursday** |

Neither player skews toward Mondays at all — they're both very much tied to the nights they command.
